title: senecio suffultus
intro: Senecio suffultus, also known as Stinking Niki Niki, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae, and is native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce sweating, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a diaphoretic, helping to break fevers. The health benefits of Senecio suffultus include its potential to reduce inflammation, ease cold and flu symptoms, and support the immune system. Traditionally, Senecio suffultus has been prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health benefits.
